user_system_path: /dashboard visual acceptance seam must pass the same dashboard/UI CI lane locally and in GitHub.
forbidden_files_raw: `app/api/**`, `app/dashboard/page.tsx`, `components/nav/NavPublic.tsx`, controller/autopilot files, `lib/**`, `supabase/migrations/**`, `app/api/stripe/**`, paid generation routes, outbound email paths, schema migrations, destructive DB actions
required_local_proof: npm run build; npm run lint; npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/large-file-splits.test.ts --reporter=verbose; npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts --reporter=list; npm run health
required_product_proof: The dashboard/UI CI lane must pass while preserving the full-screen dashboard app shell, empty/no-action state, notification affordances, neutral non-owner copy, write_document preview/support behavior, and post-skip empty state.
acceptance_condition: CI passes for the dashboard visual seam while preserving the full-screen dashboard app shell and authenticated dashboard behavior.
stop_condition: Stop if build, lint, large-file-splits, dashboard-navigation, authenticated-routes, push, or GitHub CI fails; do not broaden into public nav, controller/meta, backend/API, paid generation, Stripe, schema, or destructive DB work.
source_truth_finding: Dashboard visual seam requires the dashboard/UI CI ladder to pass from a clean tree.
required_closure_update: Update ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and append SESSION_HISTORY.md with the dashboard visual CI repair follow-up receipt and GitHub CI result.
anti_regression_checks: app/dashboard/page.tsx stays at or below 1000 counted lines
mobile and desktop notification affordances remain visible where covered
mobile dashboard card/footer stay above the in-shell bottom navigation
neutral non-owner account copy does not say Workspace Owner or Brandon Kapp
empty/no-action and post-skip states expose dashboard-empty-state without paid scan actions
write_document preview and support text remain visible
dashboard-navigation and authenticated-routes both pass locally before push
next_command: Run dashboard visual CI repair follow-up only. Proof ladder: npm run build | npm run lint | npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/large-file-splits.test.ts --reporter=verbose | npx playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts --reporter=list | npm run health. Stop only when pushed and GitHub CI is green.
